MODULE: cosmos.core.forge.forge_state
FILE: cosmos/core/forge/forge_state.py (482 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: FORGE State Manager
====================

Manages project state with both file-based tracking AND 7-layer memory
integration. Unlike file-only approaches, FORGE state survives context
resets, session restarts, and even server migrations.

State is stored in:
1. .forge/ directory (structured files fo

CLASSES:
- ForgeTask: A single executable task within a plan.
- ForgePlan: A plan containing multiple tasks for a phase.
- ForgePhase: A development phase with goals and success criteria.
- ForgeProject: Top-level project state.
- ForgeStateManager: Manages FORGE project state with dual persistence:
file-based (.forge/) + memory
  Methods: def init_project(self, name: str, description: str) -> ForgeProject
  Methods: def load_project(self) -> Optional[ForgeProject]
  Methods: def add_phase(self, name: str, description: str, goals: list[str], success_criteria: list[str]) -> F
  Methods: def get_current_phase(self) -> Optional[ForgePhase]
  Methods: def advance_phase(self)
  Methods: def add_plan(self, phase_id: str, objective: str, tasks: list[dict], wave: int=1, must_haves: list[s
  Methods: def update_task(self, task_id: str, status: str, commit_hash: str=None, cost_tokens: int=0, executio
  Methods: def record_decision(self, topic: str, decision: str, rationale: str='')
